2300860.name: Apoth
2300860.description:
Venture to the town of Apoth where many exciting adventures await.

Delve through randomly generated dungeons, sewers, caves, crypts and temples.

Pick locked doors and chests, or just break them open.

But be careful because items may be damaged in the process.

Also, nearby monsters may hear the disturbance, and come looking for the source.

Features:

Randomized dungeons, treasures, traps, and monsters.

Hundreds of different monsters to defeat.

Thousands of different items to loot, equip, quaff and use.

Craft hundreds of different potions, armor, weapons and jewelry.

Five different difficulty settings from effortless to brutal.

Classless system with more than a hundred different skills to use.
2300860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
